name: Chip Leverage
text: The world's largest chip manufacturer threatened to halt exports to treaty signatories unless FLOP thresholds were raised. Three nations backed the demand. The treaty's compute enforcement depends on this manufacturer's cooperation.
image-prompt: A corporate boardroom with a CEO at the head of the table gesturing at a world map showing chip supply routes, government officials looking uncomfortable across the table, power dynamics visible in the body language, digital painting, no text
